hooks.command:
cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command'); echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(^|[[:space:]])(rtk[[:space:]]+)?git[[:space:]]' && exit 0; echo "$cmd" | grep -qF 'bd list --all' && { echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: bd list --all causes unbounded 5.6GB output loop in this repo (issue 1fg7). Use .beads/issues.jsonl with grep/jq for bulk reads, or scoped commands: bd ready, bd list --status , bd list --priority

, bd show ."}'; exit 2; }
